summary: Summit World-Model Architecture (SWMA) core scaffolding — observation, representation, state, dynamics, planning layers implemented.
findings: Observation pipeline accepts text, image, video, audio, graph modalities
Representation layer emits UnifiedStateVector via Self-Flow latent embeddings
State model anchors every WorldState to a Neo4j graph snapshot
Dynamics model exposes predictNextState(state, action) interface
Planning engine runs rollout simulation and selects best-scoring policy
Feature flag WORLD_MODEL_ENABLED=false guards all production paths
threat_model_notes: Dataset tagging enforced at ingest boundary
Simulation policy gate prevents misuse of planning engine
